description.p: Sorcerers who became cursed objects, and are now in a new body

Age.Your lifespan depends on the body you have possessed.
Alignment.Cursed vessels are almost always chaotic people, not caring about what happens to others around them and wanting to cause destruction.
Size.Your size depends on the race you have possessed.
Speed.Your base walking speed depends on the race you have possessed.
This Body Is Mine.You have advantage on saving throws against effects that would alter or change your form.
Languages.You can speak, read, and write Common.
Subrace.There are multiple forms of vessels, however they are all based on consuming cursed objects. There are the reincarnated, who were simply sorcerers who were consumed by creatures who were adapted for their incarnation. There are the death paintings, which take over the body of said vessel despite its host having a will. And then there are the incomplete and complete vessels. In case the cursed object's host still had a will, it would start as an incomplete vessel and then become a complete vessel after erasing the will of the old body owner.

setters.set: Yuji, Choso, Eso, Kechizu, Hajime, Ryu, Takako, Reggie, Hiromi, Fumihiko, Daido, Miyo
Itadori, Kashimo, Ishigori, Uro, Star, Higuruma, Takaba, Katana, Rokujushi

description.p: You have advantage on saving throws against effects that would alter or change your form.

sheet.description: You have advantage on saving throws against effects that would alter or change your form.

description.p: You are a sorcerer from a past era. Now you are in your second life through some deal or accident.

Ability Score Increase.You have been brought back to your peak, you can choose one ability score to increase by 2 and another ability score to increase by 2.
Life Experience.This isn't your first shot at life and last time you learned a few things. You will gain proficiency in two skills or one skill and one tool of your choice.
Cling to Life.You have died once and refuse to let it happen again. Whenever you are reduced to 0 hit points, you can choose to instead remain at 1 hit point, once per long rest.
You have died once and refuse to let it happen again. Whenever you are reduced to 0 hit points, you can choose to instead remain at 1 hit point, once per long rest.

sheet.description: Whenever you are reduced to 0 hit points, you can choose to instead remain at 1 hit point.

description.p: A disastrous mixture of curse and man made by an evil scientist. Stuck as a fetus until fed to a host.

Ability Score Increase.Your cursed object has overcome the body of your initial host, so instead of gaining the host's ability scores, you gain a +3 to your Cursed Energy score. This cannot go above 20.
Durable Body.Once you incarnated into a vessel, due to your unnatural properties the body became more durable. Your maximum hit points increase by 2, and increase by 2 again every time you gain a level.
Poisonous Blood.Your birth came from someone from the Kamo clan, and from experimentation, your blood became poisonous. As a reaction, when you take piercing or slashing damage, you can choose a creature within 5 feet of you to take poison damage equal to your proficiency bonus. If the creature has an injury or less than their maximum hit points, they must make a DC 10 Constitution save or be poisoned until the end of their next turn.

Your birth came from someone from the Kamo clan, and from experimentation, your blood became poisonous. As a reaction, when you take piercing or slashing damage, you can choose a creature within 5 feet of you to take poison damage equal to your proficiency bonus. If the creature has an injury or less than their maximum hit points, they must make a DC 10 Constitution save or be poisoned until the end of their next turn.

sheet.description: When you take piercing or slashing damage, you can choose a creature within 5 feet of you to take {{proficiency}} poison damage. If the creature has an injury or less than their maximum hit points, they must make a DC 10 Constitution save or be poisoned until the end of their next turn.
